title: Control Saver Mod
description: Saves your options so you dont need to change your controls everytime you change version or play with a modded client.
body:
The Control Saver mod is a mod for **saving your controls** to fix the issue of them reseting when switching versions or clients.

To **save your controls** you use the command:
/saveoptions
This will save your options and whenever you enter minecraft it will put those saved controls as your controls, solving the reseting problem. if you wish to change the saved ones again you can simply change your controls use the command again and the new saved one will be updated each time.

If the mod is not compatible with the version you need, please tell me on the github page and I will add support for it!

Keep in mind I havn't tested every possible situation, therefore there could be situations where it will not work or break, if such thing happen please report the issue on github or contact me anywhere else and I will attempt to fix the issue as soon as I can.

thanks.
